---
title: "make_action_cli"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/utils-misc.R#L52)

# `make_action_cli()`

Make Action field CLI args

## Usage

```r
make_action_cli(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | action class |

## Value

list
